# mtncloud_task (Resource)

Manages an MTN Cloud automation task (script, playbook, email, or restart). The `type` selects which fields apply; fields for other types are rejected at plan time. Remote-exec `password` is write-only and never returned by the API. Note: the MTN Cloud edge runs a WAF that inspects request bodies and may reject inline script `content` containing shell commands (HTTP 403 "Blocked By WAF"); if so, source the script from a repository or URL (`source_type = repository`/`url`), or have the WAF allow these payloads.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Shell script task (inline content), run on the provisioned resource.
resource "mtncloud_task" "deploy" {
  name           = "deploy-app"
  type           = "shell"
  source_type    = "local"
  content        = file("${path.module}/deploy.sh")
  execute_target = "resource"
  sudo           = true
  retryable      = true
  retry_count    = 3
}

# Ansible playbook task sourced from a git integration/repository.
resource "mtncloud_task" "configure" {
  name     = "configure-web"
  type     = "ansible"
  git_id   = 12
  git_ref  = "main"
  playbook = "site.yml"
  tags     = "web"
}

# Email notification task.
resource "mtncloud_task" "notify" {
  name          = "notify-ops"
  type          = "email"
  source_type   = "local"
  content       = "<p>Provisioning complete.</p>"
  email_address = "ops@example.com"
  subject       = "Deployment finished"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the task.
- `type` (String) Task type. One of: `ansible`, `email`, `powershell`, `python`, `restart`, `shell`. Changing it forces a new task.

### Optional

- `allow_custom_config` (Boolean) Whether custom config may be passed at execution.
- `code` (String) User-defined code/identifier for the task.
- `content` (String) Inline script/template content (when `source_type = local`).
- `content_path` (String) Source path or URL (when `source_type = url` or `repository`).
- `content_ref` (String) Git reference/branch (when `source_type = repository`).
- `continue_on_error` (Boolean) Whether a workflow continues when this task fails.
- `credential_id` (Number) ID of a stored credential to use for remote execution (instead of inline username/password).
- `elevated` (Boolean) Run elevated (powershell type).
- `email_address` (String) Recipient email address (email type).
- `execute_target` (String) Where the task runs: `local`, `remote`, or `resource`.
- `git_id` (Number) Ansible git integration ID (ansible type).
- `git_ref` (String) Ansible git reference/branch (ansible type).
- `host` (String) Remote host (shell/powershell with `execute_target = remote`).
- `labels` (List of String) Labels applied to the task. Merged with the provider's default_labels into `labels_all`.
- `options` (String) Additional ansible command options (ansible type).
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Remote password (write-only; never returned by the API).
- `playbook` (String) Ansible playbook to run (ansible type).
- `port` (String) Remote port (shell/powershell with `execute_target = remote`).
- `python_additional_packages` (String) Additional pip packages to install (python type).
- `python_args` (String) Command arguments passed to the script (python type).
- `python_binary` (String) Python binary to use (python type).
- `repository_id` (Number) Integration/repository ID (when `source_type = repository`).
- `result_type` (String) How script output is parsed (script types): `value`, `keyValue`, or `json`.
- `retry_count` (Number) Number of retries when `retryable`.
- `retry_delay_seconds` (Number) Delay between retries, in seconds.
- `retryable` (Boolean) Whether the task retries on failure.
- `skip_tags` (String) Ansible skip-tags (ansible type).
- `skip_wrapped_template` (Boolean) Skip the wrapped email template (email type).
- `source_type` (String) Script/template source: `local`, `url`, or `repository` (script and email types).
- `subject` (String) Email subject (email type).
- `sudo` (Boolean) Run the shell script with sudo (shell type).
- `tags` (String) Ansible tags (ansible type).
- `username` (String) Remote username (shell/powershell with `execute_target = remote`).
- `visibility` (String) Task visibility: `private` or `public`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the task.
- `labels_all` (List of String) Effective labels: the provider's default_labels merged (union) with `labels`.
